{{Quote|They were fools. Despite their technological capabilities, the Malagarrians could not control the radioactive energy from within the planet. In a matter of weeks, millions of Malagarrians died. The few survivors moved underground. In time, they died, too. Only the droids remained.|Q-7N|<ref name="Star Wars Missions 20: Total Destruction">''[[Star Wars Missions 20: Total Destruction]]''</ref>}}
'''Malagarrians''' were [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] native to [[Malagarr/Legends|Malagarr]]. Their society was highly advanced, causing them to plumb the depths of their [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] natural resources. Eventually, they turned the entire planet into a giant reactor, which backfired and quickly eradicated their race.

{{Species-stub}}
